## Summary

- Describe the main change in one or two sentences.

## Testing

- [ ] `pre-commit run --all-files`
- [ ] Relevant Bazel build completed
- [ ] Relevant Bazel tests completed
- [ ] Manual verification completed, if applicable

## Notes

- Link related issues or follow-up work.
- Include screenshots or recordings for UI changes.
- Call out any ROMs, fixtures, or third-party assets used for testing or documentation.
